title: Use Gatherer factory overload without finisher
description: When a defaultFinisher is passed to a Gatherer factory, the overload that does not take a finisher should be used. This improves code clarity and maintainability by avoiding unnecessary parameters and potential confusion. Refactoring to the correct overload ensures the intended behavior is clear and reduces maintenance effort.
recommendation: Refactor Gatherer factory calls to use the overload without a finisher when passing defaultFinisher.

checks.message: Refactor Gatherer factory calls to use the overload without a finisher when passing defaultFinisher.
